input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.4.10.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.4.10.2
            TITLE: penalty points may be subtracted from the design score

            CONTENT:
            rule S.4.10.2: Penalty points may be subtracted from the Design score
S.4.10.2 Penalty points may be subtracted from the Design score

final_answer: Penalty points may be subtracted from the Design score
